package rulefixtures

import (
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for http_handler_missing_security_headers: HTTP handler functions that write responses without setting `X-Content-Type-Options`, `X-Frame-Options`, or `Content-Security-Policy` headers (or without security header middleware)
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario718Negative(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	w.Header().Set("X-Content-Type-Options", "nosniff")
	w.Header().Set("X-Frame-Options", "DENY")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
